response.global_analysis: The audio features a performance of 'Deal with the devil' by Tia, followed by a live talk segment by VTuber Aki Rosenthal. The provided Reference JSON contains lyrics for the beginning of the song; I have transcribed the remaining song lines and the conversational segment from the audio. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, with splits occurring at natural pauses to ensure accuracy.

subtitles.original: Deal with the devil
subtitles.english: Deal with the devil

subtitles.original: Uhhhhnn...
subtitles.english: Uhhhhnn...

subtitles.original: 興奮たまらないわ スリル
subtitles.english: The excitement, I can't stand the thrill

subtitles.original: 誰にも触らせない このmoney
subtitles.english: I won't let anyone touch this money

subtitles.original: A million dollars
subtitles.english: A million dollars

subtitles.original: I'd say raise
subtitles.english: I'd say raise

subtitles.original: さあ come on 覚悟決めて
subtitles.english: Come on, make up your mind

subtitles.original: 震え高ぶれ My heart
subtitles.english: Shake, be excited, my heart

subtitles.original: 欲しがるようじゃね まだベイビー
subtitles.english: If you want it, you're not ready yet, baby

subtitles.original: 誰にも負けない 感じさせて Love me honey
subtitles.english: I won't lose to anyone, let me feel it, love me honey

subtitles.original: 透かし過ぎて You dummy
subtitles.english: Seeing through everything, you dummy

subtitles.original: 読み切ったわ レッスン
subtitles.english: I've read through it all, lesson

subtitles.original: 見栄を張って 演じきらなきゃね
subtitles.english: Putting on a show, you have to play the part

subtitles.original: どんな小さな 嘘だって
subtitles.english: No matter how small the lie

subtitles.original: 私の方が見逃さないわ
subtitles.english: I won't let it escape my sight

subtitles.original: I'm the gambler アイ・ゲット・ザ・レイズ
subtitles.english: I'm the gambler, I get the raise

subtitles.original: 駆け引きの相手は ごめんね
subtitles.english: Sorry to the one I'm playing against

subtitles.original: 私が決めてあげる
subtitles.english: I'll be the one to decide it all

subtitles.original: 狙った獲物は 逃がさない
subtitles.english: I won't let my targeted prey get away

subtitles.original: 唇濡らして いただきます My fate
subtitles.english: Wetting my lips, I'll take it—my fate

subtitles.original: ダイヤのジャックで 手が揃うわ
subtitles.english: With the Jack of Diamonds, I've got my hand

subtitles.original: 笑みは殺して 待つだけ
subtitles.english: Kill your smile and just wait

subtitles.original: 私のポーカーフェイスはパーフェクト
subtitles.english: My poker face is perfect

subtitles.original: 一部の隙も見せたりしないわ
subtitles.english: I won't show even the slightest opening

subtitles.original: 視線感じて You're the one
subtitles.english: Feeling your gaze, you're the one

subtitles.original: お遊びは 最後まで
subtitles.english: The game continues until the very end

subtitles.original: 見てるばかりじゃ 嫌いよ
subtitles.english: I hate just being watched

subtitles.original: 私が欲しくてたまらない？
subtitles.english: Do you want me so badly?

subtitles.original: 負けるのは怖い？ ヨロシク
subtitles.english: Afraid to lose? Nice to meet you

subtitles.original: 読み切ったわ レッスン
subtitles.english: I've read through it all, lesson

subtitles.original: 見栄を張って 演じきらなきゃね
subtitles.english: Putting on a show, you have to play the part

subtitles.original: 私のモノにするわ あなたの髪の1本まで全部
subtitles.english: I'll make you mine, down to every single hair on your head

subtitles.original: I'm the gambler アイ・ゲット・ザ・レイズ
subtitles.english: I'm the gambler, I get the raise

subtitles.original: 震えているのよ 坊や
subtitles.english: You're shaking, aren't you, boy?

subtitles.original: どこまでも行くわ
subtitles.english: I'll go as far as it takes

subtitles.original: 見栄を張って 演じきらなきゃね
subtitles.english: Putting on a show, you have to play the part

subtitles.original: ためらわないで 触れて
subtitles.english: Don't hesitate, touch me

subtitles.original: 誰にも触らせない このmoney
subtitles.english: I won't let anyone touch this money

subtitles.original: I'm the gambler アイ・ゲット・ザ・レイズ
subtitles.english: I'm the gambler, I get the raise

subtitles.original: さあ come on 覚悟決めて
subtitles.english: Come on, make up your mind

subtitles.original: 灰になるまで 打って
subtitles.english: Play until you turn to ash

subtitles.original: 欲しがるようじゃね まだベイビー
subtitles.english: If you want it, you're not ready yet, baby

subtitles.original: 誰にも負けない 感じさせて Love me honey
subtitles.english: I won't lose to anyone, let me feel it, love me honey

subtitles.original: あれ？ 椅子なくなっちゃった。
subtitles.english: Wait, the chairs are gone.

subtitles.original: あー、もう少し座らせてほしかった。
subtitles.english: Ah, I wanted to sit for a little longer.

subtitles.original: はい、みんな！ 見えてる？ 聞こえてる？
subtitles.english: Hey everyone! Can you see me? Hear me?

subtitles.original: ホロライブ所属の癒し系ハーフエルフ、アキロゼことアキ・ローゼンタールです！
subtitles.english: I'm Hololive's healing half-elf, Akirose, a.k.a. Aki Rosenthal!

subtitles.original: ハローハローハロー！ アローナ！
subtitles.english: Hello, hello, hello! Aloha!

subtitles.original: えー、今回のアキロゼ生誕祭2026へようこそ！
subtitles.english: Well, welcome to this Akirose Birthday Celebration 2026!

subtitles.original: 早速ね、なんかいろいろ行われていたんですが、
subtitles.english: Right away, various things were happening, but...

subtitles.original: 一体今回のライブはどうなっちゃうのか、
subtitles.english: what exactly is going to happen in this live?

subtitles.original: ぜひ最後まで必戦、お見逃しなくお願いします。
subtitles.english: Please make sure to watch until the very end, don't miss it.

subtitles.original: 今回のライブのハッシュタグは「#アキロゼ生誕祭2026」
subtitles.english: The hashtag for this live is '#AkiroseBirthdayCelebration2026'.

subtitles.original: こちらをつけて、Xにたくさんポストしてね！
subtitles.english: Please use it to post a lot on X!

subtitles.original: もちろん可愛いスクショ、絵もたくさん撮って、
subtitles.english: Of course, take lots of cute screenshots and drawings,

subtitles.original: 合わせて投稿してください。
subtitles.english: and post them together.

subtitles.original: ライブが終わった後、アキロゼ見に行きます！
subtitles.english: After the live, I, Akirose, will go take a look!

subtitles.original: 見てねー！ あ、チャンネル登録もよろしくね！
subtitles.english: Check it out! Oh, and please subscribe to the channel too!

subtitles.original: OK？ 特撮撮って？
subtitles.english: OK? Did you get the shot?

subtitles.original: はい、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Alright, thank you!

subtitles.original: お、お？ なんだ？ なになになに？
subtitles.english: Oh, oh? What's this? What's going on?

subtitles.original: うーん、っていうかここどこなんだろう？
subtitles.english: Hmm, and I wonder where this place is?

subtitles.original: おぉー！ あんなとこにルーレットがある！
subtitles.english: Whoa! There's a roulette wheel over there!

subtitles.original: え？ 回るのかな？
subtitles.english: Eh? Will it spin?

subtitles.original: まー まー 回った！ え、すごい！ 回った！
subtitles.english: It- It- It's spinning! Oh, wow! It spun!
